title: Tools: save_draft + list_drafts (and brain.drafts table)
userStory: As Steve, I want drafts persisted as app state (not graph state) so that I can revisit and send later.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/lib/server/tools/drafts.ts exporting save_draft and list_drafts
Postgres table brain.drafts created with columns id, created_at, target_persona, target_company, channel, subject, body, sent_at, episode_id
list_drafts queries unsent drafts with optional company filter
Sending a draft (separate UI flow) promotes it to a Graphiti Outreach episode and stamps episode_id + sent_at
Verify: save then list round-trips a draft; promotion path creates the episode and updates the row
